arts.ttl: Preview: Heerenveen vs. Ajax - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Eredivisie clash between Heerenveen and Ajax, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

In-form Ajax is aiming for a fourth consecutive Eredivisie win as they face Heerenveen at Abe Lenstra Stadion on Sunday. Ajax recently triumphed over RKC Waalwijk with a score of 2-1 in their last lea...
